name: Taniylah Hargrove

transcripts.q3: Hello. My name is Tanaka Hargrove and I enjoy working with kids, because they are so funny and it's so amazing and fun to see how their brain works in such a big world and I've been working with kids for almost seven years now.
transcripts.q4:
Hello. So I am located in Gainesville, Georgia, the farthest that I would be willing to travel for a shift is about 30 minutes probably
 If I really, really had a choice, no more than 15 20, but the furthest I am willing to go is 30 minutes.
transcripts.q5: Hello. I am looking for full-time and part-time work. And I also have open availability. My schedule is not really too strict.
transcripts.q6:
The way I would solve a conflict between two students who are heading in my classroom as one I would separate them. And then separately, ask them what happened and then from that point, I will make an incident report if there's any scratches bruises or anything that they did not come to school with, I would make an incident report about it, and then I would tell my director and have my director pretty much informed the parents of whatever. Scratches there may be an allow the parents to
 No what happened before they come and pick their student up and then from that point forward within the classroom, I would keep a very close eye contact on them and make sure that they're still not fighting and if they continue to fight then I would have to separate them a little further in the classroom.
transcripts.q7: So I will make a great up kid teacher because I am very resourceful. I'm very observant, I engage with the classroom. I engage what's going on. I know what's going on in my classroom and I know how to keep a classroom flowing as positively as possible. Also, I'm honest who doesn't want an honest teacher on their team.

ai_summary: Taniylah brings nearly seven years of childcare experience and emphasizes safety-first conflict resolution with clear incident reporting. She values honesty and classroom engagement, making her a dependable team member who maintains a positive flow in the classroom.
